calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MAXVI 1 LLC'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is GRANTED. Lis Pendens is expunged. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,410. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christin Dale, Esq., C. DALE LAW, (510) 859-7235, christin@cdale.law, for Plaintiff Maryia Ruchka
Timothy J. Silverman, Esq., SCHEER LAW GROUP, LLP (949) 263-8757, TSilverman@scheerlawgroup.com, for Defendants Geroge Washington Lending Inc, aka Premier Executive Lending LLC, et al

Hearing held, not ARGUED. Court confirms that the amended proof of service was filed on November 9, 2022. Defendant's counsel asks the Court for a continuance of his motion.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MAXVI 1 LLC'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Request For Monetary Sanctions is continued to December 7, 2022. Notice is waived.

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)
